info.name: FocusForest Backend
info.description:
Complete API test collection for the FocusForest backend. Run folders in order: Health → Auth → Sessions → Trees → Groups → Edge Cases → Dev Tools.

Before running: make sure your server is up with `npm run dev`.

variable.description: Auto-set by Signup or Login response
Auto-set by Signup or Login response
Auto-generated UUID for edge case test

item.name: 1 — Health Check
item.description: Basic server health check. Run this first to confirm the server is responding.

request.description: Health check — no auth required. Returns { status: 'ok' }.

item.name: 2 — Auth
item.description: Authentication flow: Signup → Login → Me → Logout. Must run Signup or Login first to populate {{jwt}}.

request.description: Register a new user. Auto-saves jwt and userId collection variables. utcOffset 330 = IST (India Standard Time).

exec: pm.test("Status is 201 (new user) or 409 (already registered — re-run)", function () {
pm.test("Response contains user object with correct fields", function () {
// Auto-save jwt and userId on first-run signup
// 409 EMAIL_TAKEN — user already registered from a previous run.
// This is expected. Run the Login request next — it will set {{jwt}}.
console.warn("[Signup] 409 EMAIL_TAKEN: test@focusforest.com already exists. The Login request will set {{jwt}}.");

request.description: Login with email and password. Auto-saves jwt and userId. Run this if Signup has already been done.
Get current authenticated user profile. Requires Bearer {{jwt}}.
Logout. Clears httpOnly cookies. JWT is stateless so you must login again to get a new token.

item.name: 3 — Sessions
item.description: Submit focus sessions and retrieve session history. Score engine runs server-side. Run Auth folder first.

request.description: Classic 25-min session with a completed task. Expected stageProgress = 1.5 (25/25 × 1.5 multiplier).

exec: // Generate a random UUID for this session
pm.test("tree.glowLevel equals 4 (1 task completed / 1 session = 100%)", function () {

request.description: Same clientSessionId as the first session. Server must reject with 409 DUPLICATE_SESSION.
Classic 25-min session, no task set. stageProgress increment = 1.0. Cumulative = 2.5.

exec: // Generate a random UUID for this session
pm.test("tree.glowLevel is less than 4 (mixed: 1 task + 1 no-task)", function () {

request.description: Sprint 15-min session with carried task. stageProgress increment = 0.6 (15/25 × 1.0). Cumulative = 3.1.

exec: // Generate a random UUID for this session

request.description: Get session history. Should return at least 3 sessions from this test run.

exec: pm.test("sessions array has total field", function () {
pm.test("Array has at least 3 sessions (from this test run)", function () {
pm.test("Each session has required fields", function () {

request.description: Get session history with date range filter and pagination.

exec: // Reset today's tree before running session tests

item.name: 4 — Trees & Calendar
item.description: Read-only tree endpoints. Reflects sessions submitted in folder 3.

request.description: Get today's live tree state. Uses user's utcOffset to determine 'today'.

exec: pm.test("isBare is false (day not over yet)", function () {
pm.test("finalisedAt is null (day not finalised yet)", function () {

request.description: Get all daily trees for March 2026. Returns array of tree objects per day.

exec: pm.test("Each tree has date, stage, glowLevel", function () {

request.description: Get a full 7-day week view (ISO week 12 of 2026 = Mon Mar 16 → Sun Mar 22). Missing days are filled with stage:0.

exec: pm.test("Response has complete boolean flag", function () {
pm.test("Response has startDate and endDate", function () {

item.name: 5 — Groups
item.description: Group creation, joining, viewing, and member management. Run Sessions folder first so forest data exists.

request.description: Create a new group. Authenticated user becomes admin and first member. Auto-saves groupId and inviteCode.
Get group details, members list, and forest stats. User must be a member.

exec: pm.test("members array has 1 entry (creator only)", function () {
pm.test("Each member has userId, name, currentStreak, joinedAt", function () {

request.description: Group accountability calendar — daily output per member for March 2026.
Try to join the group you just created. Should return 409 ALREADY_MEMBER.
Leave the group (self-removal). Uses {{groupId}} and {{userId}} collection variables.

item.name: 6 — Edge Cases & Error Handling
item.description: Verify validation, auth guards, and consistent error envelope { error: { code, message } }.

request.description: No Authorization header. Must return 401 UNAUTHORIZED.

exec: pm.test("Error envelope has code and message", function () {

request.description: variant is not one of: sprint|classic|deep_work|flow|custom. Must return 400 VALIDATION_ERROR.

exec: // Generate a random UUID for this session
pm.test("Error envelope is correct shape", function () {

request.description: Body is missing focusMinutes, taskStatus, clientSessionId. Must return 400 VALIDATION_ERROR.

exec: pm.test("Error envelope matches { error: { code, message } }", function () {

request.description: Group ID that does not exist. Must return 404 GROUP_NOT_FOUND or 403 FORBIDDEN.

exec: pm.test("Status is 404 or 403 (not found or not a member)", function () {
pm.test("Error envelope has code and message", function () {

request.description: Invite code 000000 does not exist. Must return 404 INVALID_INVITE_CODE.

item.name: 7 — Dev Tools
item.description: Development-only utilities. Only available when NODE_ENV != production.

request.description: Manually trigger the midnight cron job. Finalizes trees, updates streaks, inserts bare soil for missed days. Use this to test streak resets without waiting for midnight.
